dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Hey Ben, did you see the news? Vite 8.0 is out today, March 12, 2026.
dialogue.chinese: 嘿 Ben，你看到新闻了吗？Vite 8.0 今天发布，2026 年 3 月 12 日。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Wow, I didn’t know. What’s new in this version?
dialogue.chinese: 哇，我不知道。这个版本有什么新内容？

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: They replaced the old bundlers with a single tool called Rolldown. It’s built in Rust, a language that runs very fast.
dialogue.chinese: 他们用一个叫 Rolldown 的统一工具取代了旧的打包器。它是用 Rust 编写的，Rust 是一种运行非常快的语言。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: A bundler is like a chef that mixes all the ingredients into one dish, right?
dialogue.chinese: 打包器就像一位厨师，把所有原料混合成一道菜，对吧？

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Exactly. And Rolldown is written in Rust, which is the same language used for browsers’ fast engines. It can combine code much quicker.
dialogue.chinese: 没错。Rolldown 是用 Rust 写的，Rust 也是浏览器快速引擎使用的语言。它可以更快地合并代码。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: How much faster? The official numbers say 10 to 30 times faster than before.
dialogue.chinese: 快多少？官方数据显示比之前快 10 到 30 倍。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Yes, that’s a huge jump. In practice, a build that used to take a minute now finishes in a few seconds.
dialogue.chinese: 是的，提升很大。实际上，以前需要一分钟的构建现在几秒钟就能完成。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: That sounds great for developers. Do they keep the old plugins?
dialogue.chinese: 这对开发者来说听起来很棒。他们还保留旧的插件吗？

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Yes, Vite 8 still works with the same wide set of plugins you already know, thanks to broad compatibility.
dialogue.chinese: 是的，Vite 8 仍然兼容你已经熟悉的广泛插件，这得益于广泛的兼容性。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: I heard they added a searchable plugin registry. Is it like a library you can browse online?
dialogue.chinese: 我听说他们推出了可搜索的插件库。是不是像可以在线浏览的图书馆？

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Exactly. Developers can search for a plugin by name and see how to add it to their project right away.
dialogue.chinese: 没错。开发者可以按名称搜索插件，并立即看到如何将其添加到项目中。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: That makes it easier to extend Vite without hunting for code online.
dialogue.chinese: 这样就不用在网上搜索代码，扩展 Vite 更容易了。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: And the whole system stays simple: one tool for building in both development and production.
dialogue.chinese: 而且整个系统保持简洁：开发阶段和生产阶段都使用同一个工具。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: So developers can move faster and spend less time waiting for builds.
dialogue.chinese: 所以开发者可以更快地推进工作，减少等待构建的时间。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: I’m excited to try it out. Maybe we can test a small project this week.
dialogue.chinese: 我很想试试。也许我们这周可以测试一个小项目。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Sounds good! Let’s start a tiny demo and see the speed difference ourselves.
dialogue.chinese: 听起来不错！让我们开始一个小型演示，看看速度差异。
